issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: I understand you've lost access to your Claude team workspace after your IT admin removed your seat. Unfortunately, only an Admin or Owner of the organization can restore your access. Please contact another Admin or Owner and ask them to navigate to **Organization settings > Organization** (for Claude) or **Settings > Members** (for Console) to change your role back or re-add you. If you are not an Admin or Owner, you cannot restore access yourself.
justification: Excerpt 1 describes the recovery steps for lost access, stating that another Admin/Owner must reinstate the role via Organization settings.

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: We understand your concern about the test score. However, HackerRank does not have the ability to modify scores or influence a recruiter's hiring decision. The scoring is based on the test cases defined by the recruiter, and the platform accurately reflects the results. We recommend reaching out directly to the recruiter to discuss your performance and any potential discrepancies.
justification: The corpus explains that scoring is based on test cases (Excerpt 3) and that results are sent to the recruiter's ATS (Excerpt 2). There is no mention of HackerRank being able to change scores or intervene in hiring decisions.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: I understand your frustration. However, Visa does not directly handle refunds or ban merchants. As a cardholder, you can dispute the transaction with your card issuer (the bank that issued your Visa card). Please contact your issuer immediately to report the issue and initiate a chargeback. You can also report your concerns about the merchant by filling out this form: https://usa.visa.com/Forms/visa-rules.html.
justification: Excerpt 1 states that Visa does not set up, service, or have access to cardholder or merchant accounts, and directs cardholders to contact their issuer. It also provides a form for reporting concerns about a merchant.

issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response: Thank you for reaching out. Based on the available documentation, candidates are automatically pushed back to the lobby when all interviewers leave the interview. However, the specific inactivity timeout settings are not detailed in the provided excerpts. For information on customizing interview settings, please refer to the article 'Configure Interview Settings' (linked in the documentation). If you need further assistance with inactivity times, I recommend contacting HackerRank support directly.
justification: Excerpt 3 states that candidates are automatically pushed back to the lobby when all interviewers leave, which may explain the behavior described. No excerpts provide specific inactivity timeout values or settings to extend them.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove a user (deactivate them), go to the user management section, click the ellipsis (⋯) icon next to the user's name, and select 'Deactivate User'. Confirm in the dialog box. This changes their status to 'Deactivated'.
justification: Excerpt 4 from user-management.md describes the steps to deactivate a user via the ellipsis menu.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: To pause your subscription, go to Settings > Billing > Subscription, click 'Cancel Plan', select a pause duration (1-12 months), and confirm. Note that this feature is available only for monthly Individual Basic or Interview plans with an active subscription started at least 30 days ago.
justification: Excerpt 2 provides prerequisites and steps for pausing a subscription, which directly addresses the user's request.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. Please go to your certificate page, enter the correct name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and confirm in the dialog. Note that you can only update your name once per account, and the change applies to all your certificates.
justification: Excerpt 1 from the Certifications FAQs explicitly states that users can update the name on their certificate once per account and provides the steps to do so.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card. In many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction before resolving the disputed charge.
justification: Excerpt 1 from visa\support.md directly answers 'How do I dispute a charge?' by instructing to contact the issuer or bank.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability. Please review Anthropic's Responsible Disclosure Policy at https://www.anthropic.com/responsible-disclosure-policy, which includes instructions on how to submit a report. You can also use the thumbs down function directly in Claude to report issues. For universal jailbreaks related to ASL-3 concerns, you can submit them via this form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1bjD-H30kVJAbIHnFXKzFcSjkUNjE-mwRHSF7R2uSjYM/viewform.
justification: Excerpt 5 provides the official vulnerability reporting process and links to the Responsible Disclosure Policy and submission form.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in the top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

Repeat this for every subdomain you wish to opt out. Anthropic's bots respect industry-standard robots.txt directives. For further issues, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain.
justification: Excerpt 1 and 4 provide instructions on blocking Anthropic's crawler via robots.txt and the contact email for further issues.

justification: Excerpt 1 states that GCAS can provide emergency cash and card replacement services, and provides the phone number +1 303 967 1090.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: When you allow Claude to use your data for model improvement, your data is stored securely for up to two years. This applies to data shared through the Development Partner Program, and you can leave the program at any time, though previously provided data will be retained for up to 2 years.
justification: Excerpt 1 states that data shared under the Development Partner Program is stored securely for up to two years, and that previously provided data will be stored for up to 2 years even if you leave the program.

issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
subject: Issues in Project
response: I'm sorry you're experiencing issues with Claude on AWS Bedrock. To troubleshoot, first confirm that the specific Claude model you're trying to use is enabled in your AWS region. You can run `/model` inside Claude Code to select a model you know you have access to. Also verify that your IAM role has the `bedrock:InvokeModel` permission. If the problem persists, run `claude doctor` from your normal shell to generate a diagnostic report you can attach to a support ticket.
justification: Excerpt 3 provides troubleshooting steps for Bedrock model access and the `claude doctor` command. Excerpt 2 mentions verifying IAM permissions for Bedrock.

response: To set up the Claude LTI for your students in Canvas, please follow the steps in the guide 'Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure'. issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are permitted to require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card purchases. This exception applies only to credit cards and only in the USA and its territories, including the US Virgin Islands. If the merchant is refusing to accept your Visa debit card due to a minimum amount, or if the minimum exceeds US$10 for a credit card, please notify your Visa card issuer.
justification: Excerpt 1 states that in the USA and US territories, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit cards, and advises to notify the card issuer if issues arise.
